description: Frozen-stack raw-vs-calibrated baseline-only replay across the pinned 6-hour, 12-hour, 20-hour, validation 24-hour, Day 1 24-hour block, Day 2 24-hour block, Day 3 24-hour block, and Day 4 24-hour block policy-v1 baselines. This analysis keeps the policy-v1 universe split, admission semantics v2, window-quality classifier v1, stage-1 good-only calibration contract, Chainlink public stream source, and task7 replay assumptions fixed while testing whether the existing calibrator improves baseline-only replay.
